dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent successfully resolved the configuration error identified in the baseline. It correctly loaded the prompt definition from 'src/prompts/assessment-flow/architecture-work-assessment.v1.md' and applied it across all 29 reasoning spans without failure.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration executed 29 distinct reasoning spans with a high average token count (approx. 5,330 tokens per span), suggesting a deep, iterative exploration of the architectural problem space.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The successful completion of the 'architecture-work-assessment' flow indicates that the agent was able to process the architectural inputs and generate assessments, which inherently involves weighing design tensions and trade-offs.
